_comment: Synthesis of PUBLIC, journal-documented structured-summary-box facts (bullet counts, sub-block labels, word bands) — NOT verbatim journal text. Mirrors the facts academic-aio/SKILL.md already states (Lancet 'Research in context' 3 sub-blocks; Radiology/RYAI 'Key Points' 3 one-claim bullets; npj 'Plain-language summary' 150-200 words). Verify current instructions-to-authors at the journal site before relying on a format; these are conventions, not guarantees.

research_in_context.label: Research in context
subblocks: Implications of all the available evidence
